name: Tabitha
text: Jerry was great to work with! I have driven my car 2 weeks and she drives just as great as the first day. I had a very great experience and I would recommend Maxim Autos to anyone. This is a family business you can trust!

name: Eduard Estopanan
text: Bought a Subaru Outback from Maxim Autos and had a great experience. Jerry was very helpful, let me take a full test drive, and answered all my questions. The contract process was smooth, with no add-ons or surprises—everything was clear and straightforward. Highly recommend.

name: Dima Tsipukh
text: Had a really good experience with Jerry, he’s super friendly, polite, and not pushy at all. Even helped us outside of regular hours. Totally recommend this dealership!

name: Jeremiah Johnson
text: I had an outstanding experience at Maxim Autos. Jerry made the entire car-buying process incredibly smooth and stress free. I'm thrilled with my Audi Q5 and will definitely be recommending them to any friends looking for a great deal. Thanks again Jerry!

name: Andrew N
text: In a world where used car salesman have a bad reputation, Jerry exemplifies the opposite. He was trustworthy and honest about the car I bought. Further, when there was an issue, he worked with me to resolve it. I would buy a car from him anytime.

name: Melissa Federman
text: Just bought my son a used car through Maxim Autos. Jerry was a pleasure to work with. The whole process was very easy. The car was in incredible condition. Highly recommend!
